# OpinCode v0.0.2

This release adds Intel Mac support, a few new themes, better background controls, and some performance work under the hood.

## what changed

- Intel-based Macs now get a native x86_64 build alongside the Apple Silicon build.
- Five new themes are included: Dracula, Vesper, Synthwave '84, Everforest, and GitHub.
- Workspace backgrounds can now use a local image, with blur and opacity controls in the UI.
- Custom themes can be created, edited, exported, and imported as `.opincode-theme` files.
- Vim mode is available in the code pane.
- The terminal now has better scrollback, font size, and font family controls.
- Keyboard shortcuts are fully customizable.
- AI autocomplete works with local models like Ollama, LM Studio, and MLX, plus cloud and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
- YOLO mode is available if you want to move faster and auto-accept minor tool approvals.
